channel.title: Tech
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Tech, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: South Korea opens the door to let Google Maps operate fully
item.description: After years of appeals, Google has finally won approval to export high-precision geographic information out of South Korea and provide proper Google M...

item.title: Ultrahuman bets on redesigned smart ring to win back U.S. market after Oura dispute
item.description: Ultrahuman’s Ring Pro promises 15-day battery life and a $479 price tag as the wearables maker expands its health-tech push.

item.title: Plaid valued at $8B in employee share sale
item.description: The new valuation is a 31% increase from $6.1 billion Plaid reached in April.

item.title: Walmart agrees to $100M settlement over deceptive pay practices in Spark Driver program
item.description: The suit said Walmart mislead drivers about their possible tips and would reduce their base pay, among other things.

item.title: A VC and some big-name programmers are trying to solve open source’s funding problem, permanently
item.description: A group of well-known open source programmers and a VC have launched the Open Source Endowment. They hope this new method will provide funding for goo...

item.title: Self-driving truck startup Einride raises $113M PIPE ahead of public debut
item.description: Self-driving trucks startup Einride has raised an oversubscribed $113 million PIPE in advance of its SPAC merger scheduled for early 2026.

item.title: Cisco says hackers have been exploiting a critical bug to break into big customer networks since 2023
item.description: The U.S. government and its allies said hackers have been exploiting the newly identified bug in Cisco networking gear around the world for years, and...

item.title: Netflix backs out of bid for Warner Bros. Discovery, giving studios, HBO, and CNN to Ellison-owned Paramount
item.description: In a one-two punch of centibillion-dollar offers, the bidding war for Warner Bros. Discovery is over. David Ellison-owned Paramount will acquire Warne...

item.title: Google launches Nano Banana 2 model with faster image generation
item.description: Google is making Nano Banana 2 a default model in Gemini app and in AI mode

item.title: Jack Dorsey just halved the size of Block’s employee base — and he says your company is next
item.description: Jack Dorsey has long been an open admirer of Elon Musk. Now, it seems, he may have been taking notes.
